name: Spinach-Cheese Swirls
recipeIngredient: 3/4 package puff pastry sheets (1 sheet), thawed
10-oz. pkg. frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Mix egg and water in a bowl and set aside.
3. In another bowl, mix cheeses, onion, garlic powder, and spinach.
4. Unfold the pastry on a lightly floured surface.
5. Brush the pastry with the egg mixture.
6. Place cheese mixture and spinach on top of the pastry.
7. Starting at one end, roll up the pastry tightly like a jelly roll.
8. Cut into 20 (1/2") slices.
9. Arrange the slices flat, about 2 inches apart on a baking sheet.
10. Brush tops of each slice with egg mixture.
11. Bake for 15 minutes or until golden.
Makes 20 appetizers.
